name: distObjInterface
title: distObjInterface
description: A type for creating blueprints and dynamic distributed objects.
All distObjInterface types are singleton types. The value of each type is bound to the name of the corresponding interface.
The types are not available for user declarations.

parameters.name: Interface
parameters.description: The optionally qualified name of a distributed object interface. It is also possible to take the reverse of in interface by using the reverse<…> operator.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
